steps.title: Read the rate of change
steps.content:
The function is linear:
$$
w(t)=720-4t
$$
The coefficient of $t$ is $-4$, so the water volume decreases by $4$ milliliters each second.

steps.title: Convert decrease to draining
steps.content: Because the question asks for the volume draining from the container each second, use the positive amount of the decrease: $4$ milliliters per second. The answer is A.
